devdoc.details: Mezo is a Bitcoin-first EVM-compatible chain where BTC is the native      gas token (18 decimals). This contract is identical in logic to the      Arbitrum version but is deployed on Mezo Testnet (chainId 31611) or      Mezo Mainnet (chainId 31612).      Deploy via Remix:        1. Set compiler to 0.8.24, enable optimizer (200 runs)        2. In "Deploy & Run", select "Injected Provider - MetaMask"        3. Make sure MetaMask is on Mezo Testnet (chainId 31611)        4. Constructor args:             _treasury  = your treasury wallet address             _feeBps    = 1000  (= 10%)             _revenueCapWei = revenue cap in wei (BTC, 18 decimals)                             e.g. for $20 cap at $100,000/BTC:                             0.0002 BTC = 200000000000000 wei

params.durationSeconds: How long access lasts after purchase
params.metadataCID: IPFS CID of the encrypted metadata JSON

createCampaign(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Create a new campaign. One campaign per wallet.

deactivateCampaign(uint256).notice: Creator can deactivate their own campaign

getCampaignByCreator(address).notice: Get the campaign ID owned by a creator (0 if none)

hasAccess(uint256,address).notice: Check if a buyer has valid, unexpired access

purchaseAccess(uint256).notice: Purchase access to a campaign. Send exactly priceWei BTC.

totalCampaigns().notice: Total number of campaigns ever created

userdoc.notice: Privacy-preserving encrypted video access platform on Mezo.

documentation.text:
@title PrivateStreamMezo
 @notice Privacy-preserving encrypted video access platform on Mezo.
 @dev Mezo is a Bitcoin-first EVM-compatible chain where BTC is the native
      gas token (18 decimals). This contract is identical in logic to the
      Arbitrum version but is deployed on Mezo Testnet (chainId 31611) or
      Mezo Mainnet (chainId 31612).
      Deploy via Remix:
        1. Set compiler to 0.8.24, enable optimizer (200 runs)
        2. In "Deploy & Run", select "Injected Provider - MetaMask"
        3. Make sure MetaMask is on Mezo Testnet (chainId 31611)
        4. Constructor args:
             _treasury  = your treasury wallet address
             _feeBps    = 1000  (= 10%)
             _revenueCapWei = revenue cap in wei (BTC, 18 decimals)
                             e.g. for $20 cap at $100,000/BTC:
                             0.0002 BTC = 200000000000000 wei

@notice Purchase access to a campaign. Send exactly priceWei BTC.
 @param id  Campaign ID
@notice Check if a buyer has valid, unexpired access
@notice Get the campaign ID owned by a creator (0 if none)
@notice Total number of campaigns ever created
@notice Creator can deactivate their own campaign
